description: How a Load.value is to be interpreted (§5.12), so non-kilogram resistance round-trips without pretending to be weight. Spec canon plus 'chain' (variable accommodating load that increases through the range; METHODOLOGY-VALIDATION G5).

tokens.label: Marked Weight
tokens.description: The nominal weight marked on the implement/plates.

tokens.label: Machine Level
tokens.description: A machine resistance level/setting (e.g. 'level 7'); unit is a machine-specific scale token.

tokens.label: Resistance Band
tokens.description: Elastic band resistance (often by color); variable through range.

tokens.label: Chain
tokens.description: Added chain weight that increases as links lift off the floor (accommodating).

tokens.label: Assistance
tokens.description: Assistance that reduces effective load (assisted pull-up/dip); value is the assistance magnitude.

tokens.label: Bodyweight-Relative
tokens.description: Load expressed as a multiple of bodyweight.

tokens.label: Effective Force
tokens.description: Measured/derived force rather than an implement weight.

tokens.label: Animal Traction
tokens.description: Resistance from an animal (e.g. equestrian/sled-dog contexts).

tokens.label: Fluid Flow
tokens.description: Air/water resistance proportional to effort (assault bike, water rower, swim).
